title: New York Baked Cheesecake

seo.title: How to Make New York Baked Cheesecake — Easy American Recipe
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make authentic New York Baked Cheesecake. This easy American recipe includes step-by-step instructions, tips, and serving ideas.

easy New York Baked Cheesecake recipe
authentic American New York Baked Cheesecake

seo.imageAlt: Authentic American New York Baked Cheesecake recipe
seo.imageCaption: Delicious homemade New York Baked Cheesecake — a beloved American classic

description: New York Baked Cheesecake is a classic American dessert renowned for its dense, rich, and creamy texture atop a buttery graham cracker crust. This iconic cheesecake is traditionally baked slowly, often in a water bath, to achieve its signature smooth consistency and prevent cracks. It's a truly indulgent treat, perfect for any special occasion or a delightful finish to a meal.

instructions.title: Prepare the Crust
instructions.text: In a medium bowl, combine graham cracker crumbs, 1/4 cup sugar, and melted butter. Press the mixture evenly into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Set aside.

instructions.title: Preheat Oven and Water Bath Setup
instructions.text: Preheat oven to 325°F (160°C). Wrap the bottom and sides of the springform pan tightly with several layers of heavy-duty aluminum foil to prevent water from seeping in. This is crucial if using a water bath for even baking.

instructions.title: Make the Cream Cheese Filling
instructions.text: In a large bowl, using an electric mixer on low speed, beat the softened cream cheese until smooth and creamy, about 2 minutes. Gradually add 1 1/2 cups sugar, continuing to beat on low speed until just combined, scraping down the sides of the bowl as needed.

instructions.title: Incorporate Remaining Wet Ingredients
instructions.text: Beat in the sour cream, vanilla extract, and optional lemon zest until just incorporated. Add eggs one at a time, beating on low speed only until each egg is just blended into the mixture. Be careful not to overmix, as this can introduce too much air and cause cracks during baking.

instructions.title: Assemble and Bake the Cheesecake
instructions.text: Pour the cream cheese filling over the prepared crust in the springform pan. Place the foil-wrapped springform pan into a larger roasting pan. Carefully pour hot water into the roasting pan until it reaches about halfway up the sides of the springform pan. Bake for 35 minutes.

instructions.title: Begin the Cooling Process
instructions.text: Turn off the oven, prop the door open slightly, and let the cheesecake cool in the oven for 30 minutes. This gradual cooling helps prevent cracks. Remove from water bath, unwrap foil, and let cool completely on a wire rack at room temperature.

instructions.title: Chill Thoroughly Before Serving
instructions.text: Once cooled to room temperature, cover the cheesecake loosely with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 4 hours, or preferably overnight, before slicing and serving. This step is essential for proper setting, dense texture, and optimal flavor development.

tips: For a crack-free cheesecake, always bake in a water bath and avoid overmixing the batter, especially after adding eggs. Slow, gentle mixing prevents air bubbles that can expand and cause cracks.
Ensure all dairy ingredients, especially cream cheese and sour cream, are at room temperature. This helps them combine smoothly without lumps, resulting in a perfectly creamy filling.

Allow the cheesecake to cool gradually in the oven with the door ajar, then completely at room temperature, and finally chill it thoroughly in the refrigerator for at least 4 hours. This multi-stage cooling process is vital for setting and achieving the signature dense, rich texture.
article: New York Baked Cheesecake is a beloved American Desserts dish enjoyed across American. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
